About Czar Consultancy

Your Dedicated Compliance Partner Across India

Specialized in providing professional services for industries, manufacturing concerns, factories, commercial establishments, banks, estates, hotels and software companies — covering all Labour Laws and related services.

Our staff and consultants have developed a reputation built on high-quality performance, professionalism and reliability — working across enterprises of every scale.

  • Reputation built on high-quality performance, professionalism and reliability
  • Years of experience across a wide variety of organizations and sectors
  • Each client is a partner — each engagement a unique opportunity for impact
  • Proprietary Payroll Software with flexibility for any payroll configuration

Home/About Us
About Czar Consultancy

India's Most Trusted Compliance & Labour Law Advisory

Delivering professional compliance, payroll and advisory services across industries for over 18 years — serving 200+ clients with professionalism, reliability and precision.

15+Years of Trust
Who We Are

Your Dedicated Compliance Partner

Czar Consultancy is specialized in providing professional services for industries, manufacturing concerns, factories, commercial establishments, banks, estates, hotels, software companies and other organizations in different areas.

We are specialized in providing all Labour Laws and other related services and handling the industrial disputes for management side. We have our own Payroll Software with flexibility of any payroll contents.

Czar Consultancy staff and consultants have developed a reputation built on high-quality performance, professionalism, and reliability. Collectively, our team has years of experience working with a wide variety of organizations — overseeing small and large enterprises.

Work With Us → Meet Our Team
Our Mission & Values

The Principles That Guide Us

Our Mission

To deliver organised, effective and eco-responsible compliance and consultancy services — with due respect to health, quality and the rule of law — creating meaningful impact at the individual, organisational, community and national level.

Our Vision

To develop as a nationwide partner in the compliance and legal services domain — committed to providing statutory security to businesses and achieving sustainable, socially responsible growth for every client.

Quality Assurance

Committed to the highest standards of quality in every service we deliver. Our processes are built around accuracy, timeliness and transparency — so you can focus on growth while we handle compliance.

Home/Insights
Knowledge Hub

Compliance Updates &
Expert Insights

Stay informed with the latest updates in Indian Labour Law, HR compliance changes, and expert commentary from the Czar Consultancy leadership team.

Home/Our Team
Executive Leadership

The People Behind
Czar Consultancy

Experienced consultants and legal advisors who bring deep domain knowledge, practical expertise and an unwavering commitment to our clients' success.

PK
POSH Trainer & HR Compliance Expert

Pooja Kaushik

Pooja leads our corporate compliance training division, specializing in the Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) Act. With extensive experience in organizational structuring, she helps enterprises design robust Internal Committees (IC), conduct sensitization workshops, and build secure, compliant workplace environments that foster trust and safety.

POSH AuditsCorporate TrainingIC StructuringPolicy Drafting
Contact Pooja
BS
Senior Labour Law Specialist

Adv. B.M. Saini

Adv. B.M. Saini brings decades of distinguished courtroom and advisory experience to Czar Consultancy. A highly respected voice in Indian labour relations, he specializes in navigating complex statutory frameworks, representing management in critical industrial disputes, and negotiating with labour unions to ensure operational continuity and legal security.

Industrial DisputesTribunal RepresentationUnion NegotiationsManagement Advisory
Contact Adv. Saini
DS
Compliance Head & Legal Strategist

Adv. Dishant Saini

As the Head of Compliance, Dishant oversees firm-wide statutory operations across our diverse client portfolio. His sharp legal acumen ensures flawless execution of statutory registrations, complex departmental audits, and multi-state compliance scaling. He acts as the critical bridge between regulatory authorities and corporate management.

Pan-India ComplianceStatutory AuditsContract Labour LawFactories Act
Contact Dishant
KS
Senior Payroll & Taxation Specialist

KP Sharma

KP Sharma is the architect behind our flawless payroll processing operations. With profound expertise in financial compliance, he manages end-to-end payroll administration, ensuring 100% accuracy in salary computations, timely EPF/ESIC remittances, and seamless tax reporting for enterprises scaling from 50 to 5,000+ employees.

Payroll ComputationEPF & ESIC FilingsTax StructuringFull & Final Settlements
Contact KP Sharma

Careers

Build Your Career With Czar Consultancy

Join a team of labour law and compliance specialists trusted by businesses across India. We're always looking for driven, detail-oriented professionals.

50+Team Members
Why Work With Us

A Place to Grow, Learn & Make an Impact

Continuous Learning

Regular training on the latest labour law amendments, compliance frameworks and HR practices to keep your expertise sharp.

Collaborative Culture

Work alongside experienced consultants and partners in a supportive environment that values initiative and teamwork.

Meaningful Work

Help businesses navigate complex statutory requirements — your work directly protects organisations and the workers within them.

Current Openings

Open Positions

Labour Law Associate

Full-TimeGurugram1–3 Yrs Experience

Assist clients with statutory registrations, compliance audits and documentation under the Factories Act, BOCW Act, Contract Labour Act and related labour legislations.

Payroll & Compliance Executive

Full-TimeDelhi0–2 Yrs Experience

Manage end-to-end payroll processing, PF/ESIC filings and statutory returns for client organisations across multiple industries.
